system.name: Relationship Synastry - Deep Partner Compatibility Analysis
system.description: Inter-chart analysis revealing relationship dynamics, strengths, challenges, and evolution
system.beyondBasic: Goes far beyond Ashtakoot matching - analyzes actual day-to-day relationship dynamics
system.purpose: Understand how two charts interact in real relationship scenarios
system.importance: Reveals practical compatibility, conflict areas, growth potential, long-term sustainability
system.principle: Two charts create third energy field - synastry analyzes this interaction
system.scope: Romantic, marriage, business partnership, friendship, family relationships
system.modernRelevance: Essential for relationship counseling, pre-marriage guidance, partnership decisions

layersOfCompatibility.name: Multiple Layers of Relationship Analysis
layersOfCompatibility.description: Compatibility exists at many levels - all must be checked

analysis: Mars placement both charts - sexual energy compatibility
8th house lord and planets - sexual expression
Mars-Mars aspect between charts - physical attraction or aggression
Yoni match (14 animals) - instinctual physical compatibility
layers.importance: Foundation level - if completely mismatched, other areas suffer

analysis: Moon-Moon aspect between charts - emotional understanding
Moon nakshatra compatibility - emotional needs alignment
Moon-Venus between charts - emotional love expression
layers.importance: Determines emotional safety and understanding in relationship
Daily communication, shared interests, intellectual stimulation

analysis: 9th house comparison - life philosophy and values
layers.importance: Long-term direction, meaning, shared life purpose

analysis: 2nd house comparison - money attitudes, family values
Saturn placement - practical approach to life
layers.importance: Practical life management, financial harmony, career support

analysis: Sun-Sun aspect - ego clashes or mutual respect
layers.importance: Mutual respect, ego boundaries, identity preservation in union

analysis: Rahu-Ketu axis comparison - karmic lessons together
layers.importance: Why relationship exists, karmic purpose, destiny fulfillment

layersOfCompatibility.integration: ALL layers must be analyzed - strength in some areas compensates for weakness in others, but complete mismatch in multiple layers = fundamental incompatibility

interChartPlanetaryAspects.name: Planet-to-Planet Aspects Between Charts (Synastry Aspects)
interChartPlanetaryAspects.description: Most important synastry technique - how planets in one chart aspect planets in partner's chart
interChartPlanetaryAspects.principle: Your planets activate partner's planetary energies - aspects show how
interChartPlanetaryAspects.orb: Use 5-8 degree orb for major aspects

harmonious: Person A Sun conjunct Person B Moon = Strong attraction, A illuminates B's emotions, natural understanding
Person A Sun trine Person B Moon = Easy harmony, A supports B emotionally, comfortable relationship
Person A Sun sextile Person B Moon = Positive support, growth together
challenging: Person A Sun square Person B Moon = Ego-emotion conflict, A's identity challenges B's emotional needs
Person A Sun opposition Person B Moon = Tension, opposite expressions, can be complementary or conflicting
keyAspects.effect: Most important for basic harmony - if very afflicted, daily friction inevitable

harmonious: Moons in same element (fire/earth/air/water) = Natural emotional understanding
Moons in trine = Deep emotional connection, instinctive understanding
Moons in sextile = Supportive emotional expression
challenging: Moons in square = Emotional needs conflict, different emotional languages
Moons in opposition = Opposite emotional responses, can feel emotionally alien
keyAspects.effect: Determines emotional safety and understanding - critical for long-term happiness

keyAspects.importance: VERY HIGH - romantic and sexual attraction
harmonious: Person A Venus conjunct Person B Mars = Strong sexual attraction, A attracts B intensely
Person A Venus trine Person B Mars = Passionate harmony, satisfying sexual chemistry
Person A Venus sextile Person B Mars = Romantic attraction, playful energy
challenging: Person A Venus square Person B Mars = Sexual tension, A's love style clashes with B's sexual expression
Person A Venus opposition Person B Mars = Intense attraction but potential conflict
keyAspects.effect: Primary indicator of romantic/sexual chemistry - if absent, relationship may feel platonic

harmonious: Mars in trine = Energies complement, good teamwork, sexual compatibility
Mars in sextile = Supportive actions, motivate each other
challenging: Mars conjunction = Intense energy, can be explosive, competition or powerful teamwork
Mars square = Conflict, aggression, power struggles, different action styles
Mars opposition = Confrontational, competitive, sexual tension
keyAspects.effect: Determines conflict style and energy compatibility - challenging aspects need conscious management

harmonious: Mercury in same element = Think alike, easy communication
Mercury trine = Intellectual stimulation, understand each other's thinking
Mercury sextile = Good conversation, mental compatibility
challenging: Mercury square = Miscommunication, different thinking styles, mental friction
Mercury opposition = Opposite viewpoints, debates, can be stimulating or exhausting
keyAspects.effect: Daily communication ease - if afflicted, constant misunderstandings

harmonious: Jupiter trine = Mutual growth, shared philosophy, optimism together
Jupiter sextile = Support each other's expansion, fortunate together
challenging: Jupiter square = Different philosophies, over-expansion together, excess
Jupiter opposition = Opposite beliefs, can be complementary
keyAspects.effect: Long-term growth potential and shared meaning

harmonious: Saturn trine = Mutual responsibility, stable structure, long-term commitment natural
Saturn sextile = Support each other's discipline and goals
challenging: Saturn conjunction = Heavy responsibility, karmic bond, can feel burdensome or deeply committed
Saturn square = Restrictive, different boundaries, discipline conflicts
Saturn opposition = Opposite approaches to responsibility
keyAspects.effect: Determines relationship stability and commitment potential - Saturn hard aspects can keep together through difficulty or create burden

keyAspects.aspect: Person A Venus - Person B Saturn
harmonious: Venus trine Saturn = Stable love, B provides security to A, loyal relationship
Venus sextile Saturn = Reliable affection, mature love
challenging: Venus conjunct Saturn = A feels restricted by B, coldness vs warmth, age gap indicator
Venus square Saturn = A's love expression blocked by B's restrictions, criticism
Venus opposition Saturn = A feels B is too serious, B thinks A is frivolous
keyAspects.effect: Critical aspect - hard aspects create 'cold shower' effect where one feels unloved/restricted

keyAspects.aspect: Person A Sun - Person B Saturn
harmonious: Sun trine Saturn = B provides discipline to A, mentor-student dynamic, stable
Sun sextile Saturn = Mutual respect, B grounds A positively
challenging: Sun conjunct Saturn = A feels suppressed by B, B is critical of A's identity
Sun square Saturn = Authority conflict, A's ego clashes with B's restrictions
Sun opposition Saturn = Father-child dynamic (unhealthy), A resents B's control
keyAspects.effect: Hard aspects create power imbalance and resentment - needs conscious work

harmonious: Person A Rahu conjunct Person B Sun/Moon/Venus = Magnetic attraction, karmic pull, obsessive quality
Rahu-Ketu axis alignment = Past life connection, intense karmic bond
challenging: Rahu aspects can be obsessive, illusory, unstable
Ketu aspects can be detached, spiritual, dissolution of ego
keyAspects.effect: Indicates karmic relationship - intensity doesn't equal healthy; often lessons to learn

interChartPlanetaryAspects.interpretation: Count harmonious vs challenging aspects - 60%+ harmonious = generally compatible; many hard aspects = relationship requires conscious work

houseOverlays.name: House Overlays - Partner's Planets in Your Houses
houseOverlays.description: Where partner's planets fall in your chart shows what areas they activate
houseOverlays.principle: Partner's planet in your house = They bring that planet's energy to that life area

overlays.effect: They illuminate your self-identity, boost confidence, you feel seen by them
overlays.positive: Mutual recognition, strong presence in your life
overlays.negative: Can overshadow you, their ego dominates your identity

overlays.effect: They feel like home, emotional security together, domestic harmony
overlays.positive: Deep emotional safety, want to live together, family feeling

overlays.effect: Romance, fun, creativity together, they bring joy and pleasure
overlays.positive: Romantic, playful, passionate, enjoy each other's company
overlays.negative: Too much fun, not serious enough for long-term

overlays.effect: EXCELLENT for marriage, they are ideal partner archetype for you
overlays.positive: Natural partnership, balance, harmony, marriage potential high
overlays.negative: Can be too idealized, not seeing real person

overlays.effect: They energize you, sexual attraction, but can be aggressive
overlays.negative: Conflicts, they trigger your anger, pushy

overlays.effect: INTENSE sexual attraction, transformative, power dynamics
Serious relationship, commitment, long-term potential, but heavy
overlays.positive: Stable, committed, mature relationship, marriage binding
overlays.negative: Feel burdened, restricted, they are too serious/critical

overlays.effect: Dampens romance and fun, they are serious about love/children
overlays.positive: Serious about children together, responsible love
overlays.negative: Kills spontaneity, you feel they're 'no fun,' age gap feeling

overlays.effect: They bring financial growth, prosperity, abundance together
Obsessive attraction, magnetic pull, karmic intensity
overlays.negative: Obsession, illusion, instability, hard to leave even if toxic

overlays.effect: Spiritual connection, but detachment and dissolution
overlays.positive: Past life connection, spiritual growth together, ego-less love
overlays.negative: Lack of interest, detachment, relationship dissolves easily

overlays.effect: Hidden relationship, self-undoing, or spiritual bonding
overlays.positive: Spiritual connection, transcendent love, past life bond
overlays.negative: Secret affair, self-sacrifice, loss of self, codependency

overlays.effect: Service, crisis, or transformation in relationship
overlays.positive: Transform together through challenges (8th), serve each other (6th)
overlays.negative: Health issues connected, constant crises, servitude feeling

houseOverlays.method: Place partner's planets in your chart - see which houses they activate - those areas become prominent in relationship

compositChart.name: Composite Chart - The Relationship Itself
compositChart.description: Midpoint chart showing relationship as its own entity
compositChart.calculation: Midpoint of each planet pair creates composite chart
compositChart.example: Your Sun 10° Aries + Partner Sun 10° Libra = Composite Sun 10° Cancer
compositChart.purpose: Shows relationship's inherent nature, independent of individuals

analysis.weak: Afflicted Moon = emotional instability in relationship

compositChart.houses: Composite house placements show relationship's focus areas
compositChart.aspects: Composite aspects show internal relationship dynamics

navamshaCompatibility.name: Navamsha (D9) Compatibility - Soul Level
navamshaCompatibility.importance: MORE IMPORTANT than birth chart (D1) for marriage
navamshaCompatibility.principle: D9 shows soul nature and marriage reality

analysis.indicators: Exalted planets, benefics in kendras, strong lagna lord
analysis.effect: Both mature souls, good marriage potential individually
analysis.marriage: Two strong D9s = strong marriage possibility

analysis.effect: Imbalanced - strong partner compensates for weak
analysis.marriage: Can work if strong partner supportive

analysis.effect: Both have marriage difficulties, immature souls

analysis.analysis: Compare 7th house, 7th lord, planets in 7th in both D9 charts
Venus placement in both D9 charts
analysis.compatible: Strong Venus in both = love and harmony in marriage

analysis.special: Person A's D9 lagna lord in Person B's D9 lagna or vice versa
analysis.effect: VERY STRONG marriage bond, souls intertwined

navamshaCompatibility.critical: Never marry without checking D9 compatibility - D1 can show attraction but D9 shows marriage reality

darakarakaAnalysis.name: Darakaraka - Spouse Significator
darakarakaAnalysis.description: Planet with lowest degree (except Rahu) indicates spouse nature
darakarakaAnalysis.finding: Calculate degrees of all planets, lowest degree = Darakaraka

compatibility.compatible: Same planet as Darakaraka in both charts = similar spouse needs
compatibility.example: Both have Venus as Darakaraka = both need beautiful, artistic, harmonious spouse

compatibility.method: Check where your Darakaraka falls in partner's birth chart
compatibility.favorable: Your DK in partner's 1st/5th/7th/9th house = they embody spouse qualities you need
compatibility.unfavorable: Your DK in partner's 6th/8th/12th = spouse qualities blocked or troubled

compatibility.method: Check if partner's lagna/Moon is in your Darakaraka sign or vice versa
compatibility.effect: Strong indication they fulfill spouse role perfectly

upapadaLagna.name: Upapada Lagna - Marriage Circumstances
upapadaLagna.calculation: Complex calculation from Arudha Pada of 12th house
upapadaLagna.shows: Not spouse nature, but marriage circumstances and quality

compatibility.favorable: Trine or sextile signs = harmonious marriage circumstances
compatibility.challenging: Square or opposition signs = different marriage expectations

compatibility.benefics: Jupiter, Venus, Mercury in Upapada = happy marriage circumstances
compatibility.malefics: Saturn, Rahu, Ketu = marriage challenges, separations indicated

conflictDynamics.name: Understanding Conflict Patterns in Relationship
conflictDynamics.description: Every relationship has conflicts - synastry shows patterns

patterns.conflict: Power struggles, both want to lead, aggression
patterns.management: Divide leadership areas, channel energy into joint projects, avoid ego battles

patterns.conflict: Ego clashes, identity conflicts, shine competition
patterns.management: Mutual respect, celebrate each other's achievements, separate identity spaces

patterns.trigger: Emotional expression, mood changes, home matters
patterns.management: Understand different emotional languages, give space, don't take personally
Active listening, clarify assumptions, accept different perspectives

patterns.conflict: Love vs lust tension, affection style mismatch
patterns.trigger: Romantic expectations, sexual initiation, affection display
patterns.management: Communicate needs explicitly, compromise on frequency/style, keep romance alive

patterns.conflict: Restriction, criticism, coldness from Saturn person
patterns.trigger: Spontaneity blocked, feel judged, burden feeling
patterns.management: Saturn person: reduce criticism, show warmth; Other: don't rebel, appreciate stability

conflictDynamics.resolution: Awareness of patterns prevents destructive cycles - use synastry insights for conscious relationship work

relationshipEvolution.name: How Relationship Evolves Over Time
relationshipEvolution.description: Relationship doesn't stay static - evolves through planetary periods

stages.synastry: Venus-Mars contacts strongest, overlook challenging aspects
stages.advice: Enjoy but don't commit without checking deeper compatibility

stages.dominantEnergy: Saturn influence begins, 7th house, Moon aspects
stages.characteristics: See real person, conflicts arise, emotional tests
stages.synastry: Challenging aspects become apparent, must address or separate
stages.advice: Work through conflicts, don't run at first difficulty

stages.characteristics: Decide to commit or separate, marriage, children
stages.synastry: Saturn aspects show commitment potential, Jupiter shows growth
stages.advice: Check D9 before marriage, ensure commitment indicators present

stages.characteristics: Deep intimacy or power struggles, shared resources, transformation
stages.synastry: 8th house overlays, Pluto aspects (if using), deep bonding or crisis
stages.advice: Navigate power dynamics consciously, maintain individual identity

stages.dominantEnergy: Jupiter wisdom, Saturn stability, 9th house meaning
stages.synastry: Overall compatibility more important than individual aspects
stages.advice: Appreciate journey together, support each other's evolution

relationshipEvolution.dashas: Check both partners' dashas - difficult dasha periods challenge relationship, supportive dashas strengthen

redFlagsInSynastry.name: Serious Red Flags - Relationship Warning Signs
redFlagsInSynastry.description: Some synastry patterns indicate serious problems - not just challenges

flags.flag: Multiple Saturn Hard Aspects to Personal Planets
flags.pattern: Saturn squares/opposes Sun, Moon, Venus, Mars in partner's chart
flags.effect: Chronic feeling of restriction, criticism, coldness, depression in relationship
flags.severity: HIGH - creates toxic dynamic over time
flags.action: Reconsider relationship or intensive couples therapy required

flags.effect: Chronic frustration, anger-depression cycle, violence potential
flags.action: Absolutely requires conscious management, therapy, or avoid

flags.pattern: Person A Moon square/opposition Person B Saturn
flags.effect: Emotional coldness, A never feels emotionally safe, depression
flags.action: Saturn person must consciously provide emotional warmth, difficult to sustain

flags.pattern: 3+ of your planets in partner's 12th house
flags.effect: Self-undoing, loss of identity, hidden relationship, or spiritual bond
flags.action: If spiritual connection, okay; if losing self, dangerous

flags.pattern: Person A Rahu conjunct Person B's personal planets
flags.action: Awareness of obsessive quality, ground relationship in reality

flags.pattern: Venus has only challenging aspects or no aspects between charts
flags.effect: Lack of affection, love not flowing, feeling unloved
flags.action: May work as friendship but difficult as romantic partnership

flags.pattern: Debilitated planets, malefics dominant in both D9 charts
flags.action: Delay marriage, do spiritual work, or accept challenging marriage as growth

flags.effect: Relationship consumed by power, control, crisis, jealousy
flags.action: Transform through crisis together or destroy each other

redFlagsInSynastry.note: One red flag = caution; multiple red flags = serious reconsideration needed

strengthsInSynastry.name: Excellent Synastry Indicators - Relationship Strengths

strengths.power: Foundation of easy relationship, daily harmony

strengths.effect: Love and fortune together, generosity, growth, optimism
Ideal partner archetype, natural marriage indicator
strengths.power: Relationship feels 'meant to be,' easy partnership
Relationship doesn't require constant work, flows naturally

strengths.effect: Relationship has clear identity and purpose

strengths.description: Same aspect repeated: A Venus trine B Mars AND B Venus trine A Mars
Partner's lagna/Moon in your Darakaraka sign
strengths.effect: They embody exactly what you need in spouse

strengthsInSynastry.integration: Relationship with multiple strengths can weather challenges much better

businessPartnershipSynastry.name: Synastry for Business Partnerships (Non-Romantic)
businessPartnershipSynastry.description: Different factors emphasized for business vs romantic

keyFactors.favorable: Trine or sextile - think alike, easy communication
Trine to partner's Sun/Mercury - provides structure without restriction
keyFactors.unfavorable: Square to personal planets - feels restricted, controlled

keyFactors.favorable: Partner's Jupiter/Sun in your 10th - they elevate your career
keyFactors.unfavorable: Partner's Saturn in your 10th - they restrict career

keyFactors.favorable: Partner's Jupiter in your 2nd/11th - financial fortune together
keyFactors.unfavorable: Partner's Saturn/Rahu in your 2nd/11th - financial instability

businessPartnershipSynastry.lessImportant: Venus aspects, 5th house overlays, romantic chemistry - nice but not essential
businessPartnershipSynastry.dealBreaker: Multiple challenging Mercury/Sun/Saturn aspects = business partnership very difficult

practicalCaseStudy.name: Complete Synastry Analysis Example
practicalCaseStudy.scenario: Couple considering marriage after 2 years dating

physical.analysis: A Mars in Gemini, B Mars in Aries exalted - B has strong sexual energy, A more mental
physical.venusMarsBetween: A Venus Aries sextile B Mars Aries - compatible sexual chemistry
physical.score: GOOD - 7/10 - compatible but different intensity levels

emotional.analysis: A Moon Pisces exalted, B Moon Cancer own sign - BOTH very strong Moons, water signs
emotional.moonMoonAspect: A Moon Pisces trine B Moon Cancer - EXCELLENT emotional compatibility
emotional.4thHouse: B Saturn in 4th - emotionally cautious but stable home
emotional.score: EXCELLENT - 9/10 - deep emotional understanding, both emotionally mature

mental.analysis: A Mercury Taurus, B Mercury Leo - earth vs fire thinking
mental.mercuryAspect: A Mercury Taurus square B Mercury Leo - some communication friction
mental.score: MODERATE - 6/10 - different communication styles, requires effort

spiritual.analysis: A Moon in 9th (dharma), B Moon in 9th - BOTH spiritual/philosophical
spiritual.jupiter: A Jupiter Sagittarius 6th, B Jupiter Sagittarius 2nd - same sign, different houses
spiritual.9thHouse: Both have strong 9th house emphasis - shared values likely
spiritual.score: EXCELLENT - 9/10 - spiritual alignment, shared life philosophy

practical.analysis: A Sun 11th house (gains), B Sun 10th house (career) - both ambitious
practical.saturn: Both have Saturn in Aquarius - same generation, similar discipline approach
practical.2nd10thHouses: B strong 10th house career focus, A strong 11th house income focus - complementary
practical.score: VERY GOOD - 8/10 - practical compatibility, career support

ego.analysis: A Sun Taurus 11th, B Sun Leo 10th - A more material focus, B more authority focus
ego.sunAspect: A Sun Taurus square B Sun Leo - ego friction, both want recognition different ways
ego.lagna: A Cancer (emotional), B Scorpio (intense) - water signs, compatible
ego.score: MODERATE - 6/10 - ego adjustments needed, but water lagnas help

karmic.analysis: Need Rahu-Ketu positions (not given) but DK analysis shows:
karmic.darakaraka: A DK Mars, B actual Mars exalted in Aries 6th - B embodies warrior spouse A needs
karmic.darakaraka2: B DK Venus, A actual Venus in Aries 10th - A embodies passionate independent spouse B needs

keyAspects.sunMoon: A Sun square B Sun (challenging), but A Moon trine B Moon (excellent) - compensates
keyAspects.venusMars: A Venus sextile B Mars - good romantic/sexual chemistry
keyAspects.moonMoon: A Moon trine B Moon - STRONGEST positive aspect, emotional foundation solid
keyAspects.mercuryMercury: A Mercury square B Mercury - communication requires work
keyAspects.saturnSaturn: Both Saturn in Aquarius - same generation, shared discipline

houseOverlays.BMoonInA9th: B Moon Cancer falls in A's 9th house - B brings emotional security to A's philosophy/spirituality - EXCELLENT
houseOverlays.AVenusInB6th: A Venus Aries falls in B's 6th house - A brings service/healing to B's daily life - supportive
houseOverlays.BJupiterInA8th: B Jupiter Sagittarius falls in A's 8th house - B brings wisdom to A's transformation/intimacy - GOOD
houseOverlays.BMarsInA10th: B Mars Aries falls in A's 10th house - B energizes A's career - supportive

D9Analysis.bothStrong: A Venus exalted in D9, B Venus in own sign - BOTH have strong marriage indicators
D9Analysis.7thLords: A 7th lord Mars strong, B 7th lord Moon strong - both capable of good marriage
D9Analysis.overall: EXCELLENT D9 compatibility - marriage likely to be fulfilling

strengths: Moon-Moon trine = STRONGEST emotional compatibility indicator
Both D9 charts strong = good marriage potential individually
Darakaraka mutual fulfillment = karmic spouse match
Both spiritual (9th house emphasis) = shared meaning
Practical complementarity = career and finance harmony
challenges: Sun-Sun square = ego adjustments needed, recognition competition
Mercury-Mercury square = communication styles differ, requires conscious effort
Different intensities (A mental, B intense) = some friction
overallAssessment.reasoning: Excellent emotional foundation (Moon trine), strong D9s, karmic fit (DK), spiritual alignment compensate for ego/communication challenges. These challenges are workable with awareness.
advice: Acknowledge ego differences - A needs material recognition, B needs authority recognition - support each other's paths
Work on communication - different styles (earth vs fire) require patience and clarity
Leverage emotional strength - when conflicts arise, return to emotional understanding (water signs)
Marriage timing - check current dashas, Jupiter transit over 7th for both would be excellent timing

predictedDynamics.dailyLife: Emotionally close, spiritually aligned, some communication friction, practical support
predictedDynamics.conflicts: Recognition needs (Sun square), communication misunderstandings (Mercury square)
predictedDynamics.strengths: Deep emotional bond, shared values, career support, karmic connection
predictedDynamics.longTerm: Strong marriage potential with conscious work on ego and communication

checklist.detail: Physical, Emotional, Mental, Spiritual, Practical, Ego, Karmic - score each
Sun-Moon, Moon-Moon, Venus-Mars, Mars-Mars, Mercury-Mercury, Saturn aspects
Where partner's planets fall in your houses - especially 1st, 4th, 5th, 7th, 8th, 12th
Compare both D9 charts, strength, 7th house, Venus, lagna lord exchange
Mutual Darakaraka fulfillment, DK placement in partner's chart
Multiple Saturn hard aspects, Mars-Saturn, Moon-Saturn, 12th house stellium, no Venus aspects
Sun-Moon harmony, Venus-Jupiter, Moon-Moon trine, favorable overlays, D9 exchange
Relationship's own identity, composite Sun/Moon/Venus placement
Identify likely conflict triggers from challenging aspects
Strengths vs challenges ratio, dealbreakers present?, workable challenges?
Favorable/Unfavorable/Conditional, advice for growth, timing for marriage

note: Synastry is art and science - no relationship is perfect. Goal is awareness of dynamics, leveraging strengths, consciously managing challenges. 70%+ compatibility with no dealbreakers = good marriage potential with conscious work.
